_comment: A task with acceptance_criteria auto-triggers the reviewer (REVIEWER_MODEL). Run: omniforge run-dag examples/03-auto-review.json -w internal --auto-approve

tasks.name: Write ONE sentence recommending the best HTTP caching strategy for a read-heavy public API, explicitly choosing among ETag, Cache-Control max-age, and stale-while-revalidate.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: The answer must recommend ONE specific strategy and justify it in at least one clause; it must not merely list all three without choosing.
